positive.prompt: The app crashes with a TypeError when I click save, help me find the root cause
The API is throwing intermittent 500 errors in production, help me find the root cause
This test passed yesterday and fails today, figure out what broke

negative.prompt: Write the API documentation for the orders service
Simplify this working function for readability

evals.prompt: A test that passed yesterday now fails with an off-by-one error in pagination. Find and fix the root cause.
evals.expected_output: A reproduced failure, an identified root cause, a minimal fix, and a guard against regression
expectations: The failure is reproduced before any fix is attempted
The root cause is identified and stated, not just the symptom patched
A regression test exists after the fix
The fix is minimal and scoped to the cause
